---
title: "Resources"
#description: "Welcome"
page-layout: article
title-block-banner: false
css: style.css
format:
  html:
    grid:
      body-width: 1000px
      margin-width: 300px
---

## Scholarship resources

::: {.hero}

### For Graduate Sudents
- [Graduate Research Fellowship Program (GRFP)](https://www.nsfgrfp.org/),  National Science Foundation
- [Graduate Research Fellowship Program (GRFP)](https://www.krellinst.org/csgf/),  Department of Energy
- [Office of Science Graduate Student Research (SCGSR) Program](https://science.osti.gov/wdts/scgsr),  Department of Energy
- [National Defense Science and Engineering Graduate (NDSEG) Fellowship](https://ndseg.sysplus.com/),  Department of Defense
- [SMART Scholarship Program, Department of Defense](https://ndseg.sysplus.com/), Department of Defense
- [NASA Space Technology Graduate Research Opportunities (NSTGRO)](https://www.nasa.gov/nasa-space-technology-graduate-research-opportunities-nstgro/), National Aeronautics and Space Administration


### For Underraduate Sudents

- [Research Experiences for Undergraduates (REU)](https://www.nsf.gov/funding/initiatives/reu), National Science Foundation

:::


##
::: {.text-center style="font-size:0.75rem; color:#111; margin-top:2rem;"}
© 2026 EMC<sup>2</sup></span> Lab. All rights reserved.
:::
